mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_GUESTBOOK_REREPLY.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_GUESTBOOK_REREPLY (ID, GUESTBOOK_REREPLY_CONTENT, GUESTBOOK_REPLY_ID, WRITER_MEMBER_ID) VALUES (#{id}, #{guestbookRereplyContent}, #{guestbookReplyId}, #{writerMemberId})
mapper.select: SELECT TBRP.ID, TBRP.GUESTBOOK_REREPLY_CONTENT, TBRP.GUESTBOOK_REREPLY_CREATED_AT, TBRP.GUESTBOOK_REPLY_ID, TBRP.WRITER_MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS WRITER_NICKNAME, TBM.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS WRITER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_GUESTBOOK_REREPLY_LIKE TBRPL WHERE TBRPL.GUESTBOOK_REREPLY_ID = TBRP.ID) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM TBL_GUESTBOOK_REREPLY TBRP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBRP.WRITER_MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID WHERE TBRP.GUESTBOOK_REPLY_ID = #{guestbookReplyId} ORDER BY TBRP.GUESTBOOK_REREPLY_CREATED_AT ASC
